adminUsers.confirmDelete: Delete user {name} ({email})? All their restaurants and data will be removed!

helpTelegram.title: Connecting Telegram
helpTelegram.lead: Step-by-step guide: create a bot, add it to a chat and fill in the data in messenger settings.
helpTelegram.step1Item3Post: — it will be shown in the chat (e.g.: Sushi Sea Orders).
helpTelegram.step1Item4Post: — it must be unique and end with bot (e.g.: sushi_sea_orders_bot).
helpTelegram.step1Item5: BotFather will reply with a token — it looks like this:
helpTelegram.step1Warn: Copy the token and store it in a safe place. Don't share it — it's the password to your bot.
helpTelegram.step2Title: Get the Chat ID — where the bot should send orders
helpTelegram.step2Lead: Decide where orders should arrive: privately to you, or in a group chat where your whole team can see them.
helpTelegram.step2A2: The bot replies with your numeric ID — e.g. 123456789. That is your Chat ID.
helpTelegram.step2A3: Make sure to open a chat with your own bot (the one you created in step 1) and press Start — otherwise the bot can't message you.
helpTelegram.step2SubB: Option B — group chat (recommended for teams)
helpTelegram.step2B1: Create a Telegram group (e.g. “Sushi Sea Orders”) and invite your colleagues.
helpTelegram.step2B2: Add your own bot to the group by its username (from step 1).
helpTelegram.step2B3: Also add @getmyid_bot — it will reply with a Group ID starting with a minus, e.g. -1001234567890.
helpTelegram.step2B4: After that @getmyid_bot can be removed from the group.
helpTelegram.step2B5: Your own bot must NOT be removed from the group — otherwise orders will stop arriving.
helpTelegram.step2Note: Group Chat IDs are always negative and start with a minus. Copy the whole thing, including the minus.
helpTelegram.step3Title: Enter the data in the admin panel
helpTelegram.step3Item2Pre: In the Telegram block fill in:
helpTelegram.step3Item2Bullet1: Bot Token — the token from @BotFather in step 1
helpTelegram.step3Item2Bullet2: Chat ID — the number from step 2
helpTelegram.step4Item1: Open the restaurant menu on your phone.
helpTelegram.step4Item2: Add a dish to the cart, fill in name and phone.
helpTelegram.step4Item3: Choose a delivery method and the Telegram messenger.
helpTelegram.step4Item5: A message from the bot with the order details should appear in your chat.
helpTelegram.faqQ1: I press “Send order” but nothing arrives in Telegram
helpTelegram.faqA1: Check that the bot is still in the group and not removed. If it's a private chat — open the bot and press Start.
helpTelegram.faqA2: Bot Token or Chat ID is empty, or the Enabled switch is off.
helpTelegram.faqA3: Wrong token or Chat ID. Check for extra spaces. For a group, the Chat ID must start with a minus.
helpTelegram.faqQ4: Orders stopped arriving after I added a new team member to the group
helpTelegram.faqA4: Most likely someone accidentally removed the bot from the group. Add it back by username.
